items.name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
This Rider Backpack features a minimalist silhouette and a classic academic style full of vitality. Inspired by the Dior men's collection, it reinterprets beige and black jacquard fabric with Oblique print throughout. Continuing the classic design with exquisite details like a double zipper closure, a large front zipper pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, it is an ideal choice for daily styling.
Back reinforced with padded mesh fabric, embossed DIOR logo
Front metal-plated metal DIOR logo
Double zipper closure
Black nylon adjustable padded shoulder strap with black calfskin details
Top leather handle
Front zipper pocket
Internal slip pocket
Model: 1VOBA088#(Small)
Dimensions: 26x37x15 cm

items.name_cn:
[Highest market version, welcome to compare]
RIDER backpack by Dior leak jacquard
Item number: 1VOBA088YKY_H00N
The "Rider" backpack features an attractive mini silhouette reminiscent of a classic school bag. We arrange the classic design in a modern way using a black "Dior" logo patch. Functional details include double zippers, a large front zip pocket, and an adjustable padded strap, making it an essential item for daily use.
Black "Dior leak" jacquard
Front "DIOR" rubber signature
Internal embossed "DIOR" signature
Double zipper closure
Adjustable padded nylon strap
Leather top handle
Back reinforced with technical mesh
Front zip pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Size: 30x42x15cm
Fits tablet, 15-inch laptop, and documents

items.name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
RIDER Backpack
Beige Dior Oblique Jacquard
Beige Rider Backpack made of Dior Oblique jacquard accented with calfskin. Made of classic pattern and lightweight jacquard material that contrasts with the casual design, it can be easily used as a daily item. Spacious internal storage can hold a 15-inch laptop, documents, iPad, etc. The single front zipper pocket allows for easy storage and retrieval of wallets, phones, earphones, keys, and other personal items.
Beige Dior Oblique jacquard with leather piping
Front palladium-finish Dior signature hardware
Internal Dior signature embossing
Adjustable nylon padded shoulder strap with leather piping
Calfskin top handle
Top zipper closure
Single front zipper pocket
Handbag or shoulder carry
Dimensions: 30 x 42 x 15 mm
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Item Number: 1VOBA088YZY_H54E

items.name_en: A2211 In Stock Chanel 🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
items.name_cn:
A2211 In Stock Chanel 🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
No exaggeration ❤️ This is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations! Classic double C logo,
quilted pattern paired with gold metal and leather chain strap for a rich texture
Small lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and care for it! Suitable for all seasons and any style 💃
A must-have in your bag collection
Small: 17*7*15cm.
9981053

items.name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Finish
MIU New Arrival Academic Style Backpack: 5BZ043. Premium distressed lambskin paired with sturdy, wear-resistant linen-blend lining. This leather backpack features a campus-style design, blending exquisite craftsmanship with a casual attitude. Distinctive multi-pocket design highlights MIU's fashionable and playful spirit. Classic leather backpack strap and shoulder strap. A versatile styling essential: pairs with white T-shirt and jeans, khaki trench coat, casual sportswear... endless styles. Fits the universe inside: iPad, folding umbrella, makeup bag. Practical, lightweight, and full of sophistication.
Size: 22X18X11.5cm
